natural_language_intent: I am finalizing the quarterly operational review for the Lagos hospital network and require a comprehensive analysis of our outpatient throughput. Here is the weekly performance data: Week 1 (Admissions: 312, Avg Wait Time: 88 minutes, Bed Occupancy: 76%), Week 2 (Admissions: 345, Avg Wait Time: 95 minutes, Bed Occupancy: 82%), Week 3 (Admissions: 330, Avg Wait Time: 102 minutes, Bed Occupancy: 85%). Please calculate the percentage change in wait times against occupancy rates and identify any period where wait times breached the 90-minute safety threshold. In parallel, fetch the current emergency triage standards from https://www.who.int/emergencies to benchmark our operational metrics against international guidelines. Compile these findings into a formal executive memorandum suitable for board review, including the statistical breakdown, compliance assessment, and three prioritized recommendations for capacity management.

persona.name: Amara Okafor
persona.work_context: Overseeing hospital network operations in Lagos.

domains.name: intelligence-core
domains.description: This domain focuses on high-level cognitive tasks including natural language processing, document analysis, and structured data manipulation. It encompasses running specialized AI tasks, summarizing complex transcripts, parsing PDF documents, and filtering raw data with JSON processors. Users employ this to distill insights from unstructured information or validate logic against schemas. It represents the reasoning layer that transforms raw inputs into actionable intelligence.

selected_tasks.name: Simulate Physics Models
selected_tasks.description: Run molecular dynamics simulations to analyze protein structures or drug binding.

domains.name: web-extraction
domains.description: This domain manages interactions with the public internet for research, API consumption, and location-based data retrieval. It supports searching web pages, fetching readable content from URLs, making HTTP requests, and querying place details. Analysts use these tools to gather competitive intelligence, verify online data, or scrape relevant information for processing. It serves as the bridge between the agent's internal logic and external public information sources.

selected_tasks.name: Search Competitor Info
selected_tasks.description: Find public details about another company or product offering.

domains.name: source-chain
domains.description: This domain orchestrates version control operations and development environment synchronization using Git and GitHub tools. It enables repository cloning, pull request management, automated build watching, and dependency installation via modern package managers. Developers utilize this for maintaining project integrity, syncing remote branches, and automating build cycles. It ensures the workspace remains aligned with external code repositories and build artifacts.

selected_tasks.name: Debug Failing CI Checks
selected_tasks.description: Investigate why automated tests are failing on GitHub and draft a plan to fix the issue safely.

natural_language_intent:
Hey, I'm putting together the Q4 performance deck for the Cairo team and need some help crunching the numbers. Here are the finalized sales figures for the quarter: Online $120,000, In-Store $85,000, and Wholesale $45,000. 

Could you analyze this data to calculate the exact revenue distribution percentages for each channel and highlight which one performed best? I need a professional summary report with these insights included. Additionally, please set up an automation flow to execute this specific analysis routine on the first Monday of every month moving forward, so we keep the data fresh without manual entry. Finally, convert the executive summary part of that report into a short audio briefing I can listen to while commuting tomorrow morning.

persona.name: Tarek Mahmoud
persona.work_context: Growing fashion brand based in Cairo.

domains.name: automation-flow
domains.description: This domain orchestrates scheduled tasks, UI interactions, and deterministic workflow executions across the system. It manages cron jobs, controls desktop nodes, renders visual canvases, and enforces approval gates for critical steps. Operators use this to automate repetitive maintenance cycles or trigger complex workflows requiring human oversight. It binds together time-based events, visual interfaces, and logic gates into cohesive operational flows.

selected_tasks.name: Generate Static PDF Documents
selected_tasks.description: Create professional quality handouts or summaries in portable document format.

domains.name: multimedia
domains.description: This domain handles the generation, capture, playback, and conversion of all forms of digital media content. It includes tools for generating images, processing video streams, capturing camera feeds, and converting text to speech for audio output. Scenarios range from creating media assets for reports to controlling home speakers or recording screen clips. It empowers the agent to interact with the physical world through visual and auditory outputs.

selected_tasks.name: Update Schema Diagram
selected_tasks.description: Modify an existing database entity relationship diagram with new tables.

selected_tasks.description: Retrieve real-time frames from an entryway security device.

natural_language_intent:
Hi, I'm finalizing the Q3 staffing strategy for our teaching hospital and need your help optimizing the budget allocation across departments. Here are the current parameters:
- ICU: Requires 75 FTEs at $45/hr.
- ER: Requires 60 FTEs at $50/hr.
- Pediatrics: Requires 45 FTEs at $40/hr.
Total monthly budget cap is $850,000. Assume standard 160 paid hours per month per nurse for calculations.

First, calculate the estimated monthly labor cost for each department and identify if any single department exceeds 40% of the total budget. Second, please structure the staffing protocols (ratios, shift types, rate tiers) into a consistent knowledge format that captures these decision rules for future session continuity. Lastly, draft a collaborative summary memo proposing adjustments to keep us within the $850k limit without compromising care standards.

persona.name: Kwasi Boateng
persona.work_context: Teaching hospital managing operations across multiple departments.

domains.name: agent-memory
domains.description: This domain governs the state, context, and inter-session communication of autonomous agents. It provides capabilities to spawn sub-agents, retrieve historical session logs, manage persistent memory entries, and transfer information between active sessions. Scenarios include debugging long-running tasks, retrieving past decisions, or coordinating multi-agent workflows. It ensures continuity and context preservation across distributed agent operations.

selected_tasks.name: Manage Knowledge Graph Structure
selected_tasks.description: Organize related concepts into a typed knowledge graph for better retrieval and linking.

selected_tasks.name: Reflect and Improve Performance
selected_tasks.description: Analyze past outputs to catch errors and permanently update my working methods.

selected_tasks.name: Investigate Previous Failures
selected_tasks.description: Examine historical logs and apply corrective strategies when a task goes wrong.

natural_language_intent:
I need to triage a spike in blocked web requests we're seeing on the perimeter. Here's the raw JSON dump from the proxy log: `[{"source_ip": "45.33.32.156", "method": "POST", "uri": "/login", "payload": "admin' OR '1'='1", "block_reason": "sql_injection"}, {"source_ip": "192.168.10.50", "method": "GET", "uri": "/../../etc/shadow", "payload": "", "block_reason": "path_traversal"}, {"source_ip": "203.0.113.5", "method": "POST", "uri": "/upload", "payload": "<?php system($_GET['cmd']); ?>", "block_reason": "file_upload"}]`. 

Categorize the threats by type, determine which source IP represents the most critical risk based on the payload complexity, and write a Python function that parses this JSON structure to extract the URI and reason for each entry. Combine the threat assessment summary and the code snippet into a markdown report I can send to the infrastructure team.
